REQUEST THAT COURT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF CERTAIN RECORDS OF THE SOLANO SUPERIOR COURT FILED BY DEFT
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

GENERAL NEGLIGENCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF POHYAR, AMAN AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-09-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-08-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-19-1996
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION HEARING SET FOR OCT-10-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF OCT-10-1996, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND FOR REASONS IN DEMURRER. CCP 430.10 (E); NO OPPOSITION. GRANT REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER.
ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AND GRANTING REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED
DECLARATION OF JOHN S. WARNLOF IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST THAT COURT TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF CERTAIN RECORDS OF THE SOLANO SUPERIOR COURT FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION
NOTICE OF RULING ON DEMURRER AND REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $83.00, IT IS ORDERED,DECREED AND ADJUDGED THAT 1. THIS ACTION BE DISMISSED; 2. DEFT AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION BE AWARDED COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $83.00. (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS OF JUDGMENT)
